text: Malware Analysis | CrowdStrike Falcon® Threat Intelligence Five Steps for Frontier AI Security Readiness Empower your teams to detect, analyze, and neutralize malware with confidence. CrowdStrike named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Cyberthreat Intelligence Technologies. The definitive threat intelligence report for the AI era. Automate malware analysis.

Uncover advanced threats. Make faster, smarter decisions with CrowdStrike malware analysis tools. Expose all malicious behavior and system interactions, going beyond common file analysis. Respond faster to threats with detailed insights, minimizing damage and reducing recovery costs. Seamlessly integrate analysis into your tools, enhancing efficiency and simplifying workflows.

Suspicious files and behaviors identified by the CrowdStrike Falcon sensor are automatically submitted for automated malware analysis. This submission happens seamlessly in the background, ensuring no interruption in endpoint performance. Comprehensive analysis of suspicious files provides insights into their behavior and impact by recording all actions, from file changes to network activity.
